title: Enriched leads materialized view — schema-corrected
brief:
PREVIOUS RUN HAD A SCHEMA BUG: referenced gl.contact, actual column is gl.contact_data (jsonb). Re-do with the verified schema below.

VERIFIED LIVE SCHEMA:

public.ghl_leads:
  id text, contact_id text, name text, first_name text, last_name text, email text, phone text, source text,
  pipeline_id text, pipeline_stage_id text, status text,
  monetary_value numeric default 0, tags text[] default '{}',
  contact_data jsonb default '{}'::jsonb,   -- USE THIS, NOT `contact`
  raw_data jsonb default '{}'::jsonb,
  ghl_created_at timestamptz, ghl_updated_at timestamptz, synced_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz default now(), updated_at timestamptz default now(),
  attorney_account_id uuid (FK attorney_accounts.id),
  casesdaily_lead_id uuid (FK casesdaily_leads.id)

public.ghl_lead_overrides:
  lead_id text PK, mb_status text, mb_status_source text, mb_status_at timestamptz,
  client_billed text, client_billed_source text, client_billed_at timestamptz,
  case_quality text, case_quality_source text, case_quality_at timestamptz,
  assigned_client text, buyer_override text, buyer_override_source text,
  lead_notes text, mb_notes text, bill_notes text,
  cost_override numeric, revenue_override numeric, meta_excluded boolean,
  created_at timestamptz, updated_at timestamptz

public.casesdaily_leads has landing_page_url text, referrer_url text (among others).

public.casesdaily_domains has domain text, is_active boolean.

public.media_buyers, public.attorney_accounts exist.

Goal unchanged: a MATERIALIZED VIEW enriched_leads_mv that resolves all EnrichedGHLLead fields via SQL (pipeline + stage labels from constants — emit them inline in the SQL since they live in TS today), with a pg_cron refresh every 5 minutes and a thin VIEW wrapper enriched_leads_v exposing camelCase columns for direct Supabase consumption.

Key priority chain per RAILWAY_LOGIC_SPEC §6 (lowest priority first; higher overrides lower):
  1. Defaults from pipeline (Garbage->Rejected, Referrals->null/internal, else Pending)
  2. GHL custom fields parsed from contact_data (mb_decision, client_bill, client, media_buyer)
  3. Dashboard overrides (ghl_lead_overrides.mb_status, .client_billed, .buyer_override, etc.)

Keep the SQL conservative. If a value cannot be cleanly inferred, leave NULL — the app handles nulls today.
outputContract:
Markdown:
1. **Architecture summary**.
2. **Migration SQL** — ```sql fenced block, ALL references to ghl_leads JSONB must use contact_data (or raw_data) — never `contact`.
   ```sql
   -- FILE: casesdaily/supabase/migrations/20260520_enriched_leads_mv.sql
   <full SQL>
   ```
3. **TS adapter**:
   ```typescript
   // FILE: casesdaily/src/lib/dashboard/data-mv.ts
   <full file>
   ```
4. **Cutover plan** + **Known gaps**.

Use pg_cron. Use CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW ... WITH NO DATA initially then refresh; create UNIQUE INDEX so REFRESH CONCURRENTLY works.
